scripts.lint:desktop-web: eslint "src/features/desktop/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "src/features/contacts/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "src/features/moments/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "src/features/channels/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "src/features/favorites/**/*.{ts,tsx}" src/features/shell/use-desktop-layout.ts src/features/shell/desktop-shell.tsx src/routes/contacts-page.tsx src/routes/character-detail-page.tsx src/routes/discover-feed-page.tsx src/routes/moments-page.tsx src/routes/friend-moments-page.tsx src/routes/channels-page.tsx src/routes/favorites-page.tsx
scripts.lint:mobile-web: eslint src/components/mobile-shell.tsx src/features/shell/use-desktop-layout.ts src/features/shell/mobile-web-route-persistence.ts src/routes/chat-list-page.tsx src/routes/contacts-page.tsx src/routes/discover-page.tsx src/routes/search-page.tsx src/routes/chat-room-page.tsx src/routes/group-chat-page.tsx src/routes/profile-page.tsx src/routes/mobile-moments-publish-page.tsx src/routes/mobile-friend-moments-page.tsx
scripts.audit:desktop-web: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint:desktop-web && pnpm audit:desktop-web:routing && pnpm build
scripts.audit:mobile-web: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint:mobile-web && pnpm build
